habitat: Indian subcontinent; drought-tolerant tree of dry tropics.
traditionalUsesEn: Traditional Indian use of leaves for skin and oral hygiene; seed oil as agricultural pesticide (azadirachtin).
traditionalUsesDe: Traditionelle indische Nutzung der Blätter für Haut und Mundhygiene; Samenöl als landwirtschaftliches Insektizid.
preparation: Leaf pastes and teas in folk practice; oil external; not a casual internal medicine.
cautions: Internal use of concentrated products can be unsafe, especially in children. Prefer external/traditional guidance.
historicalNotes: Village pharmacy tree of rural India; WHO and ethnobotany frequently cite it.
habitatDe: Indienn subcontinent; drought-tolerant tree von dry tropics.
preparationDe: Blatt pastes und teas in folk practice; Öl äußerlich; not a casual innerlich medicine.
cautionsDe: Innere Anwendung von konzentriert products kann be unsafe, especially in Kinder. Prefer äußerlich/traditionell Anleitung.
historicalNotesDe: Village pharmacy tree von rural Indien; WHO und ethnobotany frequently cite it.
